01222121120020100011110220210 - ASI: 22

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  012 = 0 * 12
  111 = 1 * 11
  210 = 2 * 10
  220 = 2 * 20
  221 = 2 * 21
  0020 = 00 * 20
  1000 = 10 * 00
  2112 = 21 * 12
  012221 = 012 * 221
  220210 = 220 * 210
  1000111 = 1000 * 111
  10220210 = 10 * 220210
  21120020 = 2112 * 0020
  01222121120020 = 012221 * 21120020
  100011110220210 = 1000111 * 10220210
  01222121120020100011110220210 = 01222121120020 * 100011110220210
